upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yaTA vAtaH puzkariRIM samiNgayati sarvataH evA te garBa ejatu' (f॰5.78.7) samiNgayati=mandamandaM nudati
'tAH (apaH) savye pARO kftvA dakziRenodiNgayati' (Sa0 brA0 1137) udiNgayati ucCAlayati
'nAtivyaktaM na cAvyaktamevaM varRAn udiNgayet' (tE0 prA0 25) udiNgayet uccArayet
'AnaSe vyAnaSa iti trirudiNgayati' (tE0 brA0 1186) udiNgayati UrDvaM calayati
